Experimental & Curious ✨ Jade 🐉
About Me

Hi! I am Yesim.

It means 'Jade'. In nature, Jade appears as a lucky plant, a serene stone, or a legendary dragon. In my work, I try to blend these three.
I'm a creative soul who believes that the world is a playground for the curious. I find myself naturally drawn to the "what if?" of every project. For me creativity isn't about finding a final destination. It's about the joy of discovery and the courage to try something that hasn't been done before.
What I do?

A Multidisciplinary Creative Process

  • Brand Identity & Visual Storytelling
  • Multi-disciplinary Design solutions
  • Concept Development & Art Direction
  • Digital & Physical Design
What I use?

Flow

I'm a creative soul who believes that the world is a playground for the curious. I find myself naturally drawn to the "what if?" of every project. For me creativity isn't about finding a final destination. It's about the joy of discovery and the courage to try something that hasn't been done before.

Portfolio

Stepping into the Inner Gallery

From brand identities to concert posters, from AI-assisted art to photography — every project I've made lives below. Filter by category and click a card to read the full story.

Podcast & Brand

'whoever' — Her Kimse

A podcast project where I handled both visual identity and content curation. An experiment in making art both audible and visible.

More

Rooted in my own life lessons and daily insights, this podcast is a philosophical and psychological space designed to remind us that we are not alone. Having crafted its entire visual world, I use this platform to explore the deep questions of our generation together. Holistic Production.

Brand Identity & Community

Mix it up: Art as a Catalyst for Change

I founded this international community to raise awareness and challenge failing systems through the lens of art and compassion.

More

Beyond creating the visual identity, products, and mascot, I also curated a podcast series featuring diverse artists—fostering a global dialogue for collective awakening. Social Media Strategy: community engagement & digital storytelling. Motion Graphics: animated cartoon videos for podcasts & social content. Content Creation: transforming philosophical talks into visual motion art.

Brand Identity & Community

Connecting Through Movement — Solidarity in Motion

In this Hamburg-based project approved by World Society Builders, we create spaces for immigrants and those feeling isolated to socialize through dance.

More

Beyond managing the design and experiential production, I serve as the project's "Safe Person," ensuring a supportive and secure environment for every participant. Fostering a sense of belonging through dance workshops and experiential events. Responsible for design and process management. These stickers were designed to encapsulate the vibrant energy of the "Solidarity in Motion" dance project. Each badge serves as a visual mantra, blending organic typography with fluid, human-centric illustrations.

Community Design

Hack <the_loop>

Hack the Loop is an Istanbul-based community dedicated to creating a more inclusive and liberating space for women and LGBTQ+ members in the gaming industry.

More

As an active member, I contributed by designing print-ready assets and visual content, providing creative support to their mission of breaking cycles and empowering diverse creators in tech.

Personal & Stock Branding

Niva Stock & The Essence of Jade

Adaptable Stock Identity — designed for a marketplace account featuring editable assets, creating a friendly, memorable, high-impact visual for the competitive world of stock design.

More

Personal Branding: The Essence of Jade — a minimalist signature inspired by the whiskers of the "Yu-Lung" (Jade Dragon). Utilizing natural tones, this logo distills my personal identity into a clean, flow-oriented symbol that bridges tradition with modern aesthetics.

Brand & Stickers

Gali Gali

I created logos and sticker designs for the Istanbul-based brand, Gali Gali. Embracing the brand's mission to deconstruct gender norms in clothing.

More

I visualized this rebellious spirit through dynamic stickers used in their orders. This project highlights how design can be more than just aesthetics—it's a tool for social liberation. "Clothing has no gender."

Visualizing the Sound

Turkodiroma — Visualizing Subconscious Pop

I designed a concert tour poster for the music group Turkodiroma, a pioneer of "subconscious pop."

More

Their mission—to say the unsaid and remind listeners that they are not alone—deeply resonates with my own creative philosophy. In this collaboration, I translated the group's deep, psychological musical tones into a compelling visual narrative for social media.

Poster Design

Terras Gauda: Minimalist Vision

Designed for the prestigious Terras Gauda poster competition, this work explores the delicate balance between minimalism and intricate detail.

More

Avoiding complexity, I interpreted the brand's deep-rooted heritage through a modern lens.

Cultural Poster

63rd International Troya Festival

This poster design aims to lift Troya out of the dark shadows of war and into the light of peace and art.

More

Instead of depicting the legendary Trojan Horse as a machine of war, I illustrated it as a graceful figure blended with Çanakkale's world-famous traditional ceramic patterns.

Illustration & Stickers

Motivation & Mindfulness

I designed this series of illustrations and stickers as gentle yet profound reminders for the daily flow of life.

More

Featuring character designs centered around themes like "Enjoy little things" and "Thankful for Mother Nature," this project merges visual storytelling with a personal mission to inspire mindfulness and inner peace.

Cover Art

Çiğdem & Rhythm

This cover art designed for an Izmir-based hip-hop/rap artist focuses on the iconic "çiğdem" (sunflower seeds) culture of the city.

More

Drawing inspiration from the raw simplicity of old-school hip-hop aesthetics, the design creates a nostalgic atmosphere while keeping the focus on the song's Izmir-themed narrative.

Cover Art

Hinterhof: Facing the Echoes

This cover art, designed for the electronic music Hinterhof, explores the themes of confronting the past, letting go, and the contrasting emotions this painful process creates.

More

The visual elements reflect both the suffocating weight of the journey and the boundless sense of liberation it ultimately brings.

Inner Gallery I

Collective Order & Self-Expression

This image illustrates the complexity of building a collective order. While some figures actively struggle to align the giant cubes and others literally become a burden on the structure.

More

In this scene, the contrast between self-expression and external judgment is on full display. While individuals on the stage are lost in their own world and living their truth, they are surrounded by the piercing gaze and trembling lashes of the outsiders.

Inner Gallery II

Collective Symphony & Progress

This scene portrays life as a rhythmic dance around a central instrument, where every individual plays a different role in the melody.

More

"Collective symphony" is not just about perfect coordination, but a mixture of those who lead the joy and those who are still finding their place in the grand design. Meanwhile, another piece depicts a stark contrast between a cold, urban landscape and a fragile natural world—a world where humanity is divided: some are fueling the destructive machinery of "progress," while others are fighting a battle to preserve the last remnants of life.

Inner Gallery III

Belonging & Overwhelm — Texture Study

In this piece, the textures create a sense of belonging. The soft, swirling patterns of the waves and foliage mirror the figures' silhouettes, suggesting they are not separate from nature but a part of its flow.

More

Texture here shifts into a medium of overwhelm. The dense, labyrinthine red texture on the left symbolizes mental suffocation, while the fragmented, eye-filled patterns on the right evoke the anxiety of constant observation.

Inner Gallery IV

Becoming & Wisdom — Texture Study

Texture defines the process of "becoming." The sharp, geometric transitions on the rabbit-like figure represent a shifting identity that is still under construction.

More

The vortex-like texture in the background suggests a warping of time and space, highlighting that the character is a dynamic energy rather than a static being. Here, texture becomes a symbol of protection and maturity: the mosaic-like, orderly texture of the turtle's shell represents the solid foundation built through accumulated life experiences, while the dotted, stippled sky suggests infinite universal possibilities and the turtle's heavy, grounded texture represents a slow, certain wisdom.

Tribute Artwork

Wax Tailor Tribute

This artwork is a tribute to the legendary Wax Tailor, whose cinematic blend of hip-hop and trip-hop has always been a massive inspiration for me.

More

I wanted to capture his unique vibe by playing with layered textures and vintage elements, like the cassette tape, to mirror how he samples sounds to create new worlds. Seeing him share this piece was an incredible moment—it's a visual representation of the rhythm and soul he brings to the music scene.

AI Art

The Place: A Mirror to Belonging (AI)

In this piece, the symbolism of the elephant takes center stage, representing strength, ancient wisdom, and the deep-rooted power of memory.

More

The vast, orange desert texture contrasts with the cool blue of the reflection, highlighting the threshold between the physical world and our internal reality. The focal point is a gilded mirror where a man and a small child see their own reflection — connecting them to the majestic elephants and suggesting they carry the same ancestral strength and wisdom within. The text "You Are Where You Belong" inside the mirror serves as a profound affirmation: belonging isn't just a physical location, but a state of being where our past and our future meet in the present.

AI Art

Ancestral Echoes in the Dreamscape (AI)

In this piece, I blended a photograph I took with the boundlessness of a dreamscape.

More

Those masks floating in the emerald mist represent the silent gaze and guidance of my ancestors, always watching over me. The dancing silhouette in the middle is the absolute freedom I find within my dreams. This work is a reflection of the secret bond I share with the spirits of the past that I carry in my veins.

Physical Design

Painted Instruments

In these works, I bring my personal motifs and textures into the physical world. This ukulele and drum are not just instruments; they are living storytellers.

More

The swirling lines and vibrant patterns I've painted on them mirror the fluid rhythm of the music they create. By applying my art to everyday objects, I strip away their ordinary nature and give them a soul, a history, and a unique identity.

Exhibition

Resonance — Hamburg Altonale Kunst 2025

In this piece, which participated in the 2025 Hamburg Altonale Kunst competition under the theme "Resonance," I explored the connection between souls through the lens of radio frequencies.

More

Exhibited in front of a Hi-Fi store, this artwork illustrates the invisible bonds between people as parallel to synchronized signals and the resonance of music. I focused on how colors—as frequencies themselves—and sound create a shared vibration that unites us. The painting acts as a visual radio station, showing that when we find the right frequency, we create a harmonious melody with one another.

Photography

Portraits of Resonance

In these photographic works, my goal is to capture more than just a face; I aim to reflect the unique energy of the soul behind it.

More

With the support of AI, I crystallize the pure joy in people's smiles and the hidden light in their eyes to create a personalized energy field for them. Each portrait becomes a "moment" where the individual's resonance is projected outward — a bridge that captures the frequency of the soul, ensuring that every smile brings its own universe into view.

Photography & AI

Ethereal Narratives & Dreamscapes

I explored the intersection of photography and AI-driven manipulation. By integrating supernatural elements like elven features into natural and studio settings, I aimed to transform ordinary portraits into ethereal narratives.

More

Another piece focuses on the harmony between human presence and vast natural landscapes. By utilizing AI to enhance color depth and environmental textures, I aimed to create a surreal yet familiar "dreamscape."

In Front of the Lens

Modeling — Gali Gali & Colcynth

Beyond creating visuals, I also love stepping in front of the lens.

More

Throughout my journey, I've had the pleasure of collaborating with brands both locally and internationally. I've modeled for the Istanbul-based brand Gali Gali and Colcynth, based in Seoul, Korea. Being on both sides of the camera gives me a unique perspective on storytelling and composition. Plus, it's just a lot of fun!

Digital Marketing Portfolio

Case Studies

Presented By: Yeşim Çağlar — Personal Presentation 2026. A closer look at my work in brand strategy, digital product design, and community management.

Solidarity in Motion

European Solidarity Corps — Hamburg
My Role

Creative & Brand Designer — full visual identity, merchandise, social media, and event planning support.

Impact

Partnered with the Municipality of Hamburg, Roots Community, and Tanzetage Dance School — reaching 30–50 young people per project phase.

What I Did
  • Designed the logo, merchandise, and all brand visuals for this EU-approved youth dance community project in Hamburg.
  • Created social media campaigns to drive engagement.
  • Assisted in event planning, aligning visual identity with the in-person experience.
  • Designed a sticker collection for project merchandise.

Evoke Beyond Visible

Wellbeing Startup — Türkiye
My Role

Digital Artist & Designer — visual identity, packaging, product card design, and jewelry collection.

The Concept

Evoke turns everyday mindful moments into physical objects — calming essential oil sets and sensory items designed as gentle daily self-reminders. Each product is a small ritual, not just a thing.

Summer Light Collection

Ocean-inspired charms (shell, starfish, coral) with custom illustrated product cards with stickers — designed to feel like a gift to yourself.

Lucid O

Individual Concept Project — Analog Wellbeing Device
My Role

Solo creator — concept, brand identity, visual storytelling, product design, and pitch deck.

The Concept

Built on Identify · Embrace · Evolve. Users tap NFC emotion cards to a sand-filled dome — the Chladni effect transforms inner chaos into visible geometric patterns through sound vibration.

Why It's Different
  • Unlike mindfulness apps, it fixes your gaze on a physical reality — not a screen.
  • Grounded in Jungian psychology, Aristotelian catharsis, and cymatics science.
  • Minimalist Scandinavian aesthetic — no buttons, pure material and ritual interaction.

"Every day, the world asks you the same question —"

SeedPuff

Academic Startup Project — UE Hamburg
  • Project Presenter: Pitched the innovative concept, technical design, and business model for SeedPuff.
  • Brand & Story Strategy: Developed the circular brand narrative and created the "Eco-Buddy" mascot using the Hero's Journey framework to drive consumer engagement.
  • Digital & App Design: Shaped the strategy for the SeedApp, integrating gamified "Green Impact" tracking and community features.
  • Target Marketing: Designed TikTok and Instagram social media strategies focused on eco-conscious Gen Z and Millennial audiences.

PathlyAI

Academic Startup Project — UE Hamburg · Digital Lab
My Role

CEO & Visionary Leader — brand direction, social media, promotional video & jingle, VR booth design, UX co-design.

What I Led
  • Set overall vision and brand direction for a team of 4.
  • Co-designed visual identity: logo, color system (deep navy, mint green, indigo). Built @pathly.ai
  • Instagram — content creation and social strategy.
  • Produced the promotional video and AI-generated jingle for social media.
  • Designed the VR trade show booth for the class presentation (Frame VR).
